verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.310-316. Chapter 31 'Argala (Planetary Intervention)' is hybrid: slokas 1-10 define Argala formation (computational — HOW to determine if Argala exists), slokas 11-18 give Argala effects (predictive — WHAT happens when Argala operates). 18 slokas total, 8 predictive, ~17 claims. All predictive rules require argala_condition primitive (NON-COMPUTABLE until Argala engine built).

claims.claim: Question sloka: Maitreya asks about Argala conditions and effects

Argala formation: planets in 4th, 2nd, 11th from a house/planet cause Argala. Obstructors in 10th, 12th, 3rd. Stronger prevails. 3+ malefics in 3rd = Vipareeta Argala. 5th also Argala, 9th counteracts. Nodes reverse. 1 planet = limited, 2+ = excellent. From sign or planet. Unobstructed = fruitful. Effects in Dasha periods.
Quarter refinement: Argala in 1st quarter countered by 4th quarter of obstructive sign. 2nd quarter eliminated by 3rd quarter.
Argala for Arudha Pada + natal ascendant + 7th from both → native famous and fortunate
Benefic or malefic causing unobstructed Argala aspecting ascendant → makes one famous
2nd house Argala → acquisition of wealth and grains
3rd house Argala → happiness from co-born
4th house Argala → residences, quadrupeds and relatives
5th house Argala → sons, grand sons and intelligence
6th house Argala → fear from enemies
7th house Argala → abundant wealth and marital happiness
8th house Argala → difficulties
9th house Argala → fortunes
10th house Argala → royal honour
11th house Argala → gains
12th house Argala → expenses
Benefic Argala → various kinds of happiness
Malefic Argala → meddling with malefic effects
Both benefic and malefic Argala → mixed results
Unobstructed Argala for ascendant, 5th and 9th → native will doubtlessly become a king and fortunate
